exemplar.title: How does the Resident Evil franchise (Specifically in RE2, RE5, and RE7) use the metaphor of biological corruption to explore moral decay in institutional power structures?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does the Resident Evil franchise (Specifically in RE2, RE5, and RE7) use the metaphor of biological corruption to explore moral decay in institutional power structures?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Research question is explicitly stated and linked to game titles (RE2, 5 & 7).
Introduction and sub-headings provide adequate signposting and maintain a clear central theme.
weaknesses: Wording is sometimes vague and repetitive, causing occasional drift into plot summary.
Methodology is underdeveloped, relying heavily on game guides and lacking clear source-selection criteria.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands reached the 3â4 band (topic clarity and research question) but the limited and poorly articulated methodology places the criterion at the upper end of the 1â2 band. Overall weaknesses in method reduce the holistic score to 2.

strengths: Demonstrates good knowledge of Resident Evil lore and accurately summarises key plot and thematic elements.
Uses subject-specific terminology (e.g. âbiological corruption,â âenvironmental storytellingâ) with reasonable accuracy.
weaknesses: Engagement with secondary theorists is brief and citation accuracy is inconsistent.
Occasional misuse of terms and informal phrasing reduce overall precision.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both strands fall solidly in the 3â4 band: the student shows good knowledge and mostly accurate use of terminology, though inconsistent citation and some imprecise language prevent an upper-band mark. A middle-band score of 3 is therefore appropriate.

strengths: Research is mostly relevant and includes a moderate range of in-game evidence, reviews, and scholarly articles.
Analysis links environmental details and character mutations to moral corruption in logical, if sometimes asserted, ways.
Argument follows a coherent through-line and synthesises narrative evidence across multiple game titles.
weaknesses: Conclusions are not rigorously supported by systematic evidence and counterarguments are largely absent.
Evaluation of sources and discussion of limitations remain superficial.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands sit at the lower boundary of the 4â6 band: research is adequate, analysis is good but not rigorous, and evaluation is partially critical. These combined qualities justify a score of 4 out of 12.

strengths: Includes a table of contents, clear section headings, and a logical game-by-game structure.
weaknesses: Heading levels are inconsistent and internal sub-sections can feel disjointed.
Citation formatting is uneven, URLs are broken, and page numbers are not clearly visible.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the basic structure meets EE requirements (structure strand in the 3â4 band), significant formatting and layout issues (broken links, inconsistent headings, missing page numbers) place layout in the 1â2 band. A conservative holistic score of 1 reflects these lapses.

strandSelections.reasoning: Methodology is described in one paragraph (âdirect gameplay analysis and game official documentsâ¦â) but there is limited evidence of systematic application.  The reference list relies heavily on game guides, wikis and magazine reviews rather than a balanced academic range, and source selection criteria are not discussed.  These weaknesses indicate a limited methodology, hence the upper end of the 1â2 band.

Word count, title and images are provided, but citation formatting is inconsistent, several URLs are broken, and page numbers are not visible in the extract.  These lapses indicate that some layout conventions are missing or applied incorrectly, corresponding to 1â2 marks; awarding 2 reflects partial compliance.

The student has gathered a moderate body of relevant material (in-game evidence, cut-scene dialogue, reviews, scholarly articles).  While many sources are journalistic, they do relate to the question and are woven into the text.  The breadth is adequate but not outstanding, justifying the lower boundary of the 4â6 band.

The student states a clear focus on âbiological corruption as a metaphor for moral decayâ and maintains this idea across the three selected games.  The introduction, sub-headings and repeated signposting show adequate clarity, but wording is sometimes vague and repetitive and the essay occasionally drifts into plot summary.  Overall purpose is evident yet not consistently sharp, fitting the middle of the 3â4 band.

The essay presents a coherent through-line (biological â institutional decay) and attempts a comparative discussion across titles and DLCs.  Evaluation of sources or of the argumentâs limitations is superficial, yet some synthesis is attempted in the conclusion.  This corresponds to a âgood argument development with partially critical evaluationâ, placing it at 4 in the 4â6 band.

Analysis moves beyond description to link architectural spaces and character mutations to moral corruption, showing logical connections.  However, claims are often asserted rather than systematically evidenced, and counter-arguments are absent.  The conclusions are âmostly supportedâ but not rigorously, fitting the 4 mark level in the 4â6 band.

A contents table, section headings and logical game-by-game structure are present, meeting EE requirements.  Nevertheless, internal sub-sections are occasionally disjointed and some headings are duplicated, so the structure, while appropriate, is not exemplary.  This comfortably fits the lower end of the 3â4 band.

The student demonstrates solid familiarity with the Resident Evil lore and can summarise plot points and thematic elements accurately.  Some secondary theorists are mentioned, but engagement with them is brief and citation accuracy is inconsistent.  Knowledge is therefore âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ, placing it in the 3â4 band.

Subject terms such as âenvironmental storytellingâ, âbiological corruptionâ and âinstitutional decayâ are used with reasonable accuracy.  Occasional misuse (e.g. âdonate an inner flavorâ) and informal phrasing limit consistency, but overall terminology is mostly correct, meriting the 3â4 band.

The research question is explicitly stated and refers to precise titles (RE2, 5 & 7).  It is sufficiently narrow for 4 000 words and is linked to the ensuing discussion.  However the phrasing is awkward and the investigation sometimes slips into general commentary about corruption, showing only partial focus; this aligns with the middle of the 3â4 band.

annotations.comment: The personal motivation discussion effectively conveys engagement and authentic interest in the topic.
Linking of primary and secondary sources here helps establish your analytical framework. Consider naming a few key theorists to strengthen knowledge display.
The section header âThe Gamesâ provides a clear structural cue, but internal transitions sometimes feel abrupt. Consider brief signposting sentences.
Plot details about Leonâs late start and mental health shift focus away from institutional corruption. Condense to maintain clarity.
The title is clearly stated at the start, accurately reflecting the research focus and meeting formatting requirements.
The inclusion of a clear word count at the front confirms adherence to the 4,000-word limit. Ensure this remains up to date if edits change length.
The table of contents is comprehensive, but several headings repeat similar wording. Consider consolidating to improve navigability.
The opening paragraph provides necessary background but reads as generic plot summary. Link more directly to your specific metaphor of corruption to sharpen focus.
Phrasing of the research question is somewhat awkward and includes misplaced quotation marks. Refine the wording for clarity and formal tone.
The methodology paragraph ends abruptly and lacks details on source selection criteria and analysis protocols. Expand to demonstrate systematic approach.
The spatial symbolism discussion linking museum-turned police station to decay is insightful and well supported by environmental details.
The sentence structure here is convoluted and contains a singular/plural mismatch. Simplify and proofread terminology to maintain precision.
The civic corruption example of Brian Irons effectively connects character design to institutional collapse, showing depth of analysis.
The synthesis neatly draws together narrative and environmental evidence to reinforce your central metaphor.
The Resident Evil 5 introduction provides necessary plot background but risks drifting into summary. Tighten focus on corruption metaphor.
The metaphor of Uroboros virus as corrupted ambition demonstrates accurate use of subject-specific terminology.
Integration of Piggyback (2009) to discuss Jill Valentineâs subversion is effective. Consider contrasting scholarly and game guide sources.
The colonial exploitation discussion adds depth to your argument but relies on a single secondary source. Broaden evidence base for stronger support.
Continuing references on page 22 show URL text split across lines. Merge and proofread to maintain accessibility.
Early Resident Evil 7 description drifts into detailed storyline rather than framing the corruption metaphor. Condense plot for analytic clarity.
Use of consistent section heading styles (e.g., h2 vs. h4) would enhance structural coherence across chapters.
The analysis of Evelineâs weaponization of family bonds is engaging and shows deep synthesis of narrative and theoretical insight.
The moral ambiguity discussion adeptly uses âmercy vs. violence,â illustrating complex ethical stakes with correct terminology.
Heading levels for âThe Price of Deceptionâ are inconsistent with earlier sections; standardize heading hierarchy.
Image caption lacks page reference and consistent citation style. Add full source details and page number to comply with formatting conventions.
The DLCs section titleâs apostrophe is incorrect. Use âDLCsâ rather than âDLCâsâ to reflect plural form.
End of Zoe analysis provides strong thematic insight but would benefit from citing peer-reviewed scholarship rather than a fandom wiki.
The Ghost Survivors analysis effectively expands themes to societal levels, showing good argument development.
Reliance on fan-curated wikis for Robert Kendoâs background weakens academic rigor. Prioritize scholarly sources or primary texts.
Lost in Nightmares section insightfully returns to architectural symbolism, enriching the corruption metaphor.
Spencerâs decline paragraph powerfully illustrates individual ambitionâs role in institutional decay. Consider adding a brief counterargument.
The conclusion restates the investigationâs contributions clearly, providing an effective synthesis of principal trends.
The conclusionâs synthesis is impressively comprehensive, but sentence 2 could be broken into shorter clauses for readability.
Your final paragraphs link gaming analysis to broader debates on ethics and accountability, demonstrating excellent subject understanding.
References list displays inconsistent formatting, broken URLs, and missing publication dates. Standardize to an accepted style guide.
